About.title: About Us
About.description: Unlocking Visual Intelligence with the Power of Mathematics

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: GeometryVision is a technology startup originating from the Department of Mathematics at the Chinese University of Hong Kong. We are dedicated to applying mathematical research in geometric analysis and quasiconformal mapping to the field of visual AI, creating innovative products supported by mathematical theory.
mission.content2: We believe that the rigor and beauty of mathematics can bring new breakthroughs to AI technology. By combining profound mathematical theory with modern deep learning techniques, we provide our customers with more precise and reliable visual intelligence solutions.

values.title: Core Values
values.description: The beliefs that guide our journey

items.precisionDesc: Pursuing mathematical precision to ensure reliable technical solutions
items.collaborationDesc: Growing with partners to create greater value together
items.excellenceDesc: Continuously pushing technological boundaries to lead the industry

items.2023: Company founded, seed round financing secured
items.2025: Expanded to international markets, built global partner network

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How can I get a product demo?
faq.a1: You can submit an application through the form above, or send an email to contact@geometryvision.online. We will contact you shortly to arrange a demo.
faq.q2: Do you provide customized development services?
faq.a2: Yes, we provide customized solution development services. Please describe your requirements in detail, and our technical team will evaluate and provide a solution.
faq.q3: How can I join the GeometryVision team?
faq.a3: We welcome talents passionate about visual AI and mathematics research. Please send your resume to contact@geometryvision.online, indicating the position you are applying for.

hero.title: AIS Scoliosis Intelligent Screening System
hero.description: Radiation-free 3D scanning + AI intelligent analysis, protecting adolescent spine health

problemItems.1: Adolescent scoliosis prevalence rate as high as 5-6% in China
problemItems.2: Early symptoms are not obvious, often missed the best intervention period
problemItems.3: Traditional X-ray examinations involve radiation, preventing frequent screening
problemItems.4: Insufficient professional screening resources, limited coverage

features.title: Core Features
features.description: Technology empowerment, making spine screening simpler and safer

scan.title: Radiation-free 3D Scanning
scan.description: Using safe optical scanning technology, no X-rays, no radiation harm to adolescents

ai.title: AI Intelligent Analysis
ai.description: Deep learning-based automatic analysis algorithm, quickly and accurately identifying scoliosis risks

dual.title: Dual-mode Application
dual.description: Supports professional clinic end and home end, meeting different screening scenarios

clinic.title: Clinic Version
clinic.description: For professional medical teams, supporting batch screening, data management and report generation

home.title: Home Version
home.description: Parents can independently complete preliminary screening, monitoring children's spine health anytime

items.2: AI automatic analysis, results in 5 seconds

cta.title: Learn More
cta.description: Medical institutions, health check centers and educational institutions are welcome to consult

hero.title: Smart Land Solution
hero.description: Video image intelligent analysis, protecting every inch of land

problemItems.1: Large land area, low efficiency of manual patrols
problemItems.2: Illegal activities are hidden, often discovered too late
problemItems.3: Difficult to preserve evidence, insufficient legal basis
problemItems.4: Data silos between departments, difficult coordination

solutionItems.2: AI real-time analysis, immediate alerts for anomalies

features.title: Core Features
features.description: Multi-technology integration, building a comprehensive land smart supervision system

video.title: Intelligent Video Analysis
video.description: Deep learning-based video image processing technology, achieving real-time target detection and tracking

farmland.title: Farmland Protection
farmland.description: Automated monitoring of farmland changes, timely detection of illegal occupation and destruction

building.title: Illegal Construction Detection
building.description: Intelligent identification of illegal buildings, assisting law enforcement for quick response

natural.title: Natural Resource Monitoring
natural.description: Dynamic monitoring of natural resources like farmland, forest, and grassland, timely detection of occupation and destruction

urban.title: Urban Planning Supervision
urban.description: Assisting urban planning departments in construction behavior supervision, identifying unapproved construction and overtime construction

environment.title: Environmental Protection Patrol
environment.description: Smart monitoring of nature reserves, wetlands, and ecological red-line areas to protect the environment

emergency.title: Emergency Response Support
emergency.description: During natural disasters, quickly assess affected areas to assist emergency command decisions

items.1: Multi-source data fusion, satellite + drone + camera

SmartLand.partnerDescription: GeometryVision has established a deep strategic partnership with Beijing Liwnas Technology Co., Ltd., combining strengths in AI visual analysis and land informatization to provide intelligent solutions for natural resource management, urban planning, environmental protection and other fields.

cta.title: Start Your Smart Land Journey
cta.description: Government departments and partners are welcome to consult and cooperate to protect land security together
